title: Apparatus
description: Apparatus is a kitchen-sink/tech modpack for Fabric mainly focused around Create.
body:
# Apparatus Pack

Apparatus is a kitchen-sink style modpack for Fabric, built around Create. It’s a sandbox for exploration, adventure, and engineering where you can:

🌍 Discover new biomes and dimensions

🏰 Conquer sprawling structures and dungeons

⚙️ Invent complex automated contraptions

Whether you’re a builder, explorer, or tinkerer, Apparatus offers a little something for everyone.

## Multiplayer Ready

This pack has been carefully balanced with multiplayer gameplay in mind. Team up with friends to build sprawling factories, raid dungeons together, or carve out your own corner of the world.

## Featured Mods
A curated collection of mods powers the Apparatus experience, blending exploration, combat, and creativity including:

[Adorn](https://modrinth.com/mod/adorn) – Furniture and decoration to make your builds feel alive

[Alloy Forgery](https://modrinth.com/mod/alloy-forgery) – Smelting alloys with style

[BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend) & [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether) – Expansive overhauls of Minecraft’s otherworldly dimensions

[Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction) – Epic battles with challenging new foes

[Create Fabric](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) – The heart of the pack: automation, machines, and kinetic contraptions

[Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker) – A chilling expansion of the Deep Dark

[Enchanting Infuser](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchanting-infuser) – A simplified take on enchanting mechanics

[Fabric Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) – Fast travel made simple

[Friends & Foes](https://modrinth.com/mod/friends-and-foes) – Adds scrapped and new mobs to enhance the world

[Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals) – A wide variety of new ores and alloys

[Simply Swords](https://modrinth.com/mod/simply-swords) – Stylish new weapons for adventurers

[Tom's Simple Storage Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) – Streamlined storage

[YUNG's Mods](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods) – Reimagined vanilla structures, bigger and better than ever

## Credits
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net
